_description: Credential registry for n8n server. Secrets use placeholders — fill from .env or create manually in UI. IDs are server-assigned and will differ on a fresh instance.

credentials.name: Microsoft Graph (Client Credentials)
credentials.notes: App-only auth for Graph API (mail read/send). No browser login needed.

credentials.name: Microsoft Outlook account
credentials.notes: Delegated OAuth2 for Outlook node. Requires browser sign-in. Being replaced by Graph client credentials.

data._setup: Create in n8n UI: Settings > Credentials > Microsoft Outlook OAuth2 API. Sign in with browser.

credentials.name: OpenAi account
credentials.notes: Used by WF-08 Email Body Parser for AI-powered order extraction.

credentials.name: Google Gemini(PaLM) Api account
credentials.notes: Alternative AI provider. Not currently used in medika-preorders.

credentials.name: Serper API
credentials.notes: Web search API. Not currently used in medika-preorders.

credentials.name: SMTP account
credentials.notes: Legacy. SMTP auth deprecated for Outlook personal accounts.

data._setup: Not recommended. Use Graph API instead.
Create in n8n UI: Settings > Credentials > Gmail OAuth2 API. Sign in with browser.
Create in n8n UI: Settings > Credentials > Google Sheets OAuth2 API. Sign in with browser.
